hero.title:
Designing the Future,
Building the Present
hero.desc: From additive manufacturing to unmanned systems, from composite technology to sustainable energy solutions — we are redefining the boundaries of industry with our innovative engineering approach.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Strong Foundations,
about.p1: Blact Systems is an advanced technology company that brings together different engineering disciplines to offer innovative solutions to industry. Our brand was born from the combination of Black, representing determination and strong stance, and Act, symbolizing swift and effective action — reflecting our commitment to bringing a vision to life.
about.p2: In our projects, we prioritize engineering excellence and maintain a balance between quality and speed in every solution.

solutions.label: Our Solutions
solutions.title: Our Engineering Solutions
solutions.desc: In our four core areas of expertise, we offer innovative and sustainable solutions to meet the needs of the industry.
solutions.card1Desc: We are shaping the future of industrial production with metal and polymer-based additive manufacturing technologies. Our active R&D efforts continue in SLM, WAAM, and LSAM technologies.
solutions.card2Desc: We develop lightweight, durable, and high-performance structural solutions through carbon fiber production and advanced composite material technologies.
solutions.card3Desc: We develop concept design and engineering solutions in the field of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and unmanned surface vehicles (USVs).
solutions.card4Desc: We develop environmentally conscious and efficient projects with concept designs and sustainable engineering approaches for energy solutions.
